name: Livestorm Webinar Platform API
what_it_does: Livestorm REST API for browser-based webinar and online event platform. Enables AI agents to manage events and sessions, retrieve registration and attendance data, access engagement analytics, manage contacts, and integrate Livestorm into CRM and marketing automation workflows. Livestorm is developer-friendly with a public REST API and good documentation.
use_cases: Creating and managing webinar events from marketing operations agents
Retrieving registration and attendance data from CRM integration agents
Accessing engagement data (questions, polls) from event analytics agents
Integrating Livestorm contact data into marketing automation workflow agents
not_for: Internal employee all-hands without customer-facing use
best_when: A SaaS company using Livestorm for product demos and customer webinars wants AI agents to manage events, track attendance, and sync lead data to CRM.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Webinar registrant and attendee data is personal data. GDPR compliance required (French company with strong EU privacy focus).

auth.notes: Livestorm API uses API key passed as Authorization Bearer token. API keys are workspace-scoped and created in Livestorm settings.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 20 active contacts, limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Meet, Webinar, and Enterprise plans scaling contacts and features
pricing.notes: French company with EU-native design. API access on paid plans. Competitive pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Registrant and attendee data requires GDPR consent
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token auth
French company — EU-only data residency; US-primary companies should verify compliance
API is more developer-friendly than many webinar competitors
Contact deduplication logic important — same person can register multiple events
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Webinar attendee PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR native (French company). EU-only data residency. Bearer token auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Webinar attendee PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR (French native). EU-only data residency. Bearer token.
